transcript: Think you can beat me? The player with the most shots in 1 minute wins. And of course, you'll get the bragging rights. So tara, game tayo dito! Let's get it, let's get it Child, please, I don't need a tower, please This is easy as a breeze, I can't teach you how to be me Now you see me, now you don't, I'm a magician You are limited, I am a limited edition They don't even make them like me anymore I'm so fleshy, I don't even say cheese anymore I don't just want it, I just want more Man, I'm a major key in this game And these keys open doors, I'm a big move Yeah, I'm a big mood You can't do me a lot of things that I didn't do Stack a paper like a book, not a Kindle You outdated, I'm the one they gettin' into And I'm breakin' sweat Let's get it, let's get it Let's get it, let's get it Let's get it, let's get it Let's get it, let's get it Yeah You get it? Yeah.
